name: loupe
description: Read DOM marks placed in the browser as precise frontend tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Use browser DOM marks as Codex tasks.
interface.longDescription: Loupe connects browser-side DOM marks to Codex through a local daemon, a stdio MCP proxy, and a startup hook that keeps the daemon available.
interface.defaultPrompt: List my open Loupe DOM marks for this project and help resolve one.
